title: Agent OS Index v0 baseline
summary: Initial maintained snapshot for 246 skills, 34 libraries, and 10 functional categories.

title_i18n.zh-CN: Agent OS Index v0 基线

summary_i18n.zh-CN: 首个受维护的数据快照，包含 246 个 Skills、34 个能力库与 10 个功能分类。
summary_i18n.en-US: Initial maintained snapshot for 246 Skills, 34 libraries, and 10 functional categories.

title: 同步全局 Skills 瘦身结果
summary: 完成一次受控的公开目录维护：公开记录已重新核对，插件与系统托管能力保持独立，私人维护证据未进入公开投影。

title_i18n.zh-CN: 同步全局 Skills 瘦身结果

summary_i18n.zh-CN: 完成一次受控的公开目录维护：公开记录已重新核对，插件与系统托管能力保持独立，私人维护证据未进入公开投影。
summary_i18n.en-US: Completed a governed public-catalog maintenance pass: public records were revalidated, plugin- and system-managed capabilities remain separate, and private maintenance evidence stays outside the public projection.

title: Published beautify-github-readme to the Skills Library
summary: beautify-github-readme was added to the local Skills Library and its sanitized public Netlify catalog.

title_i18n.en-US: Published beautify-github-readme to the Skills Library

summary_i18n.zh-CN: beautify-github-readme 已加入本地 Skills Library，并以净化后的公开字段同步至 Netlify 目录。
summary_i18n.en-US: beautify-github-readme was added to the local Skills Library and its sanitized public Netlify catalog.
